title: Settings
confirm_logout: Are you sure you want to logout?
logout_failed_message: Could not complete logout. Your data may still be on this device.
sms_android_only: SMS transaction sync is only available on Android devices.
no_network_logout: No internet connection. Please check your network and try again.
logout_error: Something went wrong while logging out. Please try again.
auto_detect_description: Automatically detect transactions from new SMS
auto_confirm_description: Skip review and auto-add detected transactions
rescan_message: This will scan all SMS messages from scratch. Previously scanned messages will be automatically skipped.
sync_failed_message: Some data may not have been saved to the cloud. If you proceed, any unsynced data will be lost.
